nasb.text: And according to the Law, one may almost say, all things are cleansed with blood, and without shedding of blood there is no forgiveness.

esv.text: Indeed, under the law almost everything is purified with blood, and without the shedding of blood there is no forgiveness of sins.

cnv.text: 按著律法，幾乎所有都是用血潔淨的，如果沒有流血，就沒有赦免。

ccb.text: 根据律法，几乎所有的器具都要用血来洁净，因为若不流血，罪就得不到赦免。

csbs.text: 按照律法，几乎一切都是用血洁净的；没有流血，就没有赦免。
